message:
feat(huh): Add text editing keybindings for word/char manipulation

Add new keybindings to the TextKeyMap for common text editing operations:

- alt+u: Uppercase word forward
- alt+l: Lowercase word forward
- alt+c: Capitalize word forward
- ctrl+t: Transpose character backward

Also implement transpose_left() method for character transposition.
These keybindings improve text input ergonomics by supporting common
readline-style editing commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
